title: Swords of Adventure
description: A small project from Fang Studios that adds in a few new weapons such as spears, great swords, daggers, etc.
body: A mod made by Fang Studios to help create a small but more exciting way to fight through the mobs that appear in the world of Minecraft. Included in the mod will be multiple weapons such as spears, daggers, great swords, katanas, and more to come! We hope you enjoy this project and would love any feedback.
